name: Cheesy Chili Success
recipeIngredient: 1 can Hormel Chili No Beans (15 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the Success Rice according to the package directions.
2. Drain the rice.
3. Combine the remaining ingredients in a saucepan.
4. Heat until the cheese is melted.
5. Stir to blend well.
6. Serve over hot cooked rice.
7. Garnish with red bell pepper or tomato slices, if desired.
